AdditionalAttributes.description:
Our classic Lightly Salted CHICKPEAS contain just three ingredients and that’s all! A deliciously crunchy, satisfying snack of roasted chickpeas lightly seasoned with a sprinkle of sea salt.  The perfect guilt free snack.

The Happy Snack Company CHICKPEAS are:
•	Only 105 calories per packet
•	5 Star Health Rated 
•	3g of Fibre 
•	Gluten, nut and dairy free
•	Non-GMO and Vegan friendly
•	Australian owned and grown

The Happy Snack Company Roasted Chickpeas Lightly Salted flavour is a nutritious, wholefood snack that provides the nourishing energy your family needs to power through the day. Enjoy them straight from the pack or add them to your favourite dishes for an extra crunch. Packed full of fibre they are perfect for lunchboxes, after-school snacks, or a wholesome bite between meals, these versatile and delicious snacks are sure to satisfy. They are also gluten, nut, and dairy free, making them suitable for various dietary needs. Each 150g multi pack offers six servings of guilt-free snacking pleasure.

The Happy Snack Company Roasted Chickpeas Lightly Salted is a vegan friendly snack that's non-GMO, with only 105 calories per 25g serving. Lightly seasoned with a sprinkle of sea salt, these slow-roasted chickpeas deliver a satisfying crunch and a savory taste that appeals to all ages. With a 5 Health Star Rating, they are a wholesome choice for any time of the day.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Since 1979, Penotti has been one of the world's largest sweet spread companies, dedicated to developing the best tasting spreads. The name Penotti comes from “nocciole”, Italian for hazelnut!


  • Bite into Belgium's favourite biscuit! Cookie Penotti is a delicious creamy Speculoos biscuit spread made with the original Belgian caramelised butter cookies. The ultimate taste sensation!
  • Ultra-smooth and super-spreadable, Cookie Penotti Original is the perfect pairing for all your sweet snacking moments:
    • Spread Penotti as a topping on bread, pancakes and donuts
    • Scoop Penotti onto your ice cream or breakfast bowl and into sweet recipes
    • Spoon it from the jar - Penotti makes it ok to be a little pen-naughty!
  • No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives.
  • GMO-free, nut-free, and vegan-friendly.
  • We're for delicious, but we're also for the planet using RSPO certified palm oil.
    • Plus, our funky glass jars make great vases, breakfast containers, lolly jars and pen cups to make recycling easy. Amazing!
  • Don't want to just eat Penotti from the jar? Find recipe inspiration at www.penotti.com or on our socials @penottianz.
  • Store in a cool, dry place.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Nutella’s signature blend of roasted hazelnuts and rich cocoa delivers a taste that’s unforgettable. Whether you're starting your day or enjoying an afternoon pick-me-up, this versatile choc hazelnut spread is a delicious choice.

Discover the iconic Nutella Hazelnut Chocolate Spread – a globally beloved treat that adds joy to every breakfast and snack. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this smooth and creamy spread is perfect on toast, pancakes, waffles, and more. Nutella’s signature blend of roasted hazelnuts and rich cocoa delivers a taste that’s unforgettable. Whether you're starting your day or enjoying an afternoon pick-me-up, this versatile choc hazelnut spread is a delicious choice. Plus, it's gluten-free, vegetarian-friendly, and Halal and Kosher certified, making it a treat everyone can enjoy.

Nutella is a must-have for special moments throughout the year. Picture Christmas morning with Nutella-covered pastries, or Easter celebrations featuring Nutella-filled hot cross buns. Make Pancake Day extra special with a drizzle of Nutella.

Life's more delicious, the Nutella way!

THE AUSSIE BREAKFAST GAME CHANGER: Transform everyday toast, pancakes, and even crumpets into a delicious morning treat! Nutella's rich hazelnut chocolate flavour is the secret to getting even the fussiest eaters excited for breakfast, making your mornings a little bit easier and a lot more delicious.

BEYOND THE JAR: Swap out your usual spreads for the rich, creamy taste of Nutella. A delicious breakfast and snack alternative to your honey, jam, peanut butter, almond butter or biscuit spreads. It’s perfect on anything from toast to croissants, or as a sweet kick for your fruit and cereal.

GLUTEN-FREE & VEGETARIAN: We know how important dietary choices are to Australian families. That's why Nutella is proudly Gluten-free while being Halal and Kosher certified. What's more is it's suitable for vegetarians, making it a delicious and inclusive choice for almost every household across the country.

NUTELLA'S VERSATILITY SHINES IN THE KITCHEN: It can be used to create a variety of baking recipes including cakes, cookies & tarts. Elevate your desserts and snacks with that unmistakable hazelnut chocolate flavour. Ready to get inspired? You can explore NUTELLA® recipes & snacks at nutella.com.au for even more delicious ideas!

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Start your day the Aussie way with VEGEMITE! 

 

VEGEMITE is more than just a spread; it's a national icon that has been bringing smiles to Australian faces since 1923. Made from a unique blend of brewers' yeast extract and enriched with essential B vitamins, VEGEMITE is a powerhouse of nutrition and flavour. 

 

Taste the Tradition: VEGEMITE's rich, savoury taste is a beloved staple in Australian households. Its bold, umami flavour, with a hint of saltiness, is perfect for those who crave a distinctive and satisfying taste experience. Spread it thinly on buttered toast for a classic breakfast or add it to your favourite sandwich for an extra burst of flavour. 

 

Versatility at Its Best: VEGEMITE isn't just for toast. Its versatility makes it a secret ingredient in many recipes. Use it to enhance the flavour of soups, stews, and marinades, or pair it with cheese and avocado for a delicious twist. The possibilities are endless! 

 

Health Benefits: Packed with B vitamins, VEGEMITE supports your overall well-being. Thiamin (B1) is essential for brain function, riboflavin (B2) supports your nervous system, niacin (B3) aids in energy release, and folate helps fight fatigue. Enjoy VEGEMITE as part of a balanced, varied diet and active lifestyle. 

 

A True Aussie Icon: Proudly owned and made in Australia, VEGEMITE embodies the spirit of the nation. Its rich history and unique taste make it a symbol of Australian culture and heritage. Whether you're a lifelong fan or trying it for the first time, VEGEMITE is sure to bring a touch of Aussie pride to your table. 

 

Discover the delicious and nutritious world of VEGEMITE today.
